title: Minimal Inhibitory Concentration (MIC)
author: Brian Kenn Baltzar
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gpwbvpe
materials: Streak the bacteria onto agar plates without inhibitor.

steps.title: Müller-Hinton Agar and Broth Plate the agar on plates
steps.instruction: Müller-Hinton Agar and Broth Plate the agar on plates.

steps.title: For each isolate, select three to...
steps.instruction: For each isolate, select three to five morphologically similar colonies from the agar plates and transfer them to a glass tube with 5ml MH-Broth. Incubate for 18-24h at 37ºC

steps.title: Measure OD450 on cultures from step...
steps.instruction: Measure OD450 on cultures from step 4, and make dilutions in x mL MHB to OD450 = 0,01

steps.title: Use the setup shown in the following figure
steps.instruction: Use the setup shown in the following figure. a

steps.title: Add 100µl of the antibiotic into column 1
steps.instruction: Add 100µl of the antibiotic into column 1

steps.title: Withdraw 50µl from each well in...
steps.instruction: Withdraw 50µl from each well in column 1, add this to the corresponding wells in column 2. Mix by pipetting up and down 4-6 times. (this makes column 2 a twofold dilution of column 1)

steps.title: Repeat step 10 down to column...
steps.instruction: Repeat step 10 down to column 10 - discard the withdrawn solution from column 10.

steps.title: Vortex the bacteria suspension from step 5
steps.instruction: Vortex the bacteria suspension from step 5. Add 50µl of the suspension to each well in columns 1-11.

steps.title: Cover the plates with film, make...
steps.instruction: Cover the plates with film, make sure to create a tight seal to prevent any evaporation.

steps.title: Measure the growth by determinating OD 450
steps.instruction: Measure the growth by determinating OD 450. Compare the data from the three triplicates, and exclude any deviations

steps.title: To exclude any errors repeat every...
steps.instruction: To exclude any errors repeat every plate setup three times (triplicates).
